name: Baldy Base Camp Pizza
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix pizza dough per instructions, adding rosemary, basil, and oregano to the dough.
2. Spread the dough evenly in a pizza pan and bake for 8 to 10 minutes until golden.
3. Cut off the top of the garlic bulb.
4. Combine olive oil and Italian seasoning in a ramekin.
5. Place the garlic cut side down into the ramekin with the olive oil mixture.
6. Transfer the garlic to the toaster oven preheated to 350°F (175°C) and bake for 25 minutes.
7. Cut the pizza into slices and serve with Cambozola cheese and garlic.
To eat, place a piece of cheese on a slice, add a garlic clove, and smear it in.
